metadata.title: Premium Agricultural Fertilizers & Solutions
metadata.description: GrowMore provides high-quality Humic Acid, Plant Growth Promoters, and agricultural solutions for Indian farmers. Research-backed formulas for better crop health.

features.title: Crop Protection
features.desc: Defend against pests and diseases effectively.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Quick answers about our premium agricultural solutions.

questions.a: GrowMore is a leading manufacturer of premium agricultural solutions, including Humic Acid, Plant Growth Promoters, and bio-safe pesticides specifically formulated for Indian farmers.

questions.q: What agricultural products does GrowMore manufacture?
questions.a: We manufacture high-quality agricultural fertilizers like Humi Zone, plant growth promoters like Grow Fast, flowering stimulants, soil conditioners, organic pesticides, and silicone spreaders.

questions.q: How can I become a GrowMore distributor in India?
questions.a: You can easily join our network of 200+ successful dealers across India. Simply contact our sales team via phone or WhatsApp on our Distributors page to apply.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Our Products
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our premium agricultural solutions.

questions.q: What types of agricultural products does GrowMore manufacture?
questions.a: GrowMore manufactures a comprehensive range of premium agricultural solutions, including humic acid fertilizers (Humi Zone), plant growth promoters (Grow Fast), flowering stimulants, soil conditioners, organic pesticides, and silicone spreaders.

questions.q: Are GrowMore agricultural products suitable for organic farming in India?
questions.a: Yes, many of our products, such as our Killer Bio Crop Protectant and Bio Stimulants, are eco-friendly and formulated specifically to support sustainable and organic farming practices across India.

questions.q: How do GrowMore plant growth promoters increase crop yield?
questions.a: Our advanced plant growth promoters, like Grow Fast and Unizyme, accelerate vegetative growth, boost plant immunity against diseases, and ensure maximum nutrient absorption, leading to significantly higher and healthier crop yields.

metadata.title: About Us | Empowering Indian Agriculture since 2015
metadata.description: Learn about GrowMore's journey, our core values of quality and innovation, and the experts behind our research-backed agricultural solutions.

hero.title: Empowering Indian Agriculture
hero.subtitle: Bridging the gap between science and soil since 2015.

story.title: Our Story
story.content: We started with a simple mission: to provide Indian farmers with high-quality, research-backed fertilizers that actually work. Over the years, we have grown from a small unit to a leading manufacturer of Humic Acid and Plant Growth Promoters. We believe that healthy soil leads to a healthy nation.

items.title: Quality Assurance
items.desc: Every batch is lab-tested for purity.

items.title: Farmer First
items.desc: Affordable solutions designed for Indian soil.

members.name: Yatin Patel
members.quote: Our goal is simple: Double the farmer's income through better yield.

members.name: Ravi Patel
members.quote: Ensuring our products reach the remotest village on time is my promise.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Distributorship
faq.subtitle: Learn how you can grow with us as a partner.

questions.q: How do I become a verified distributor for GrowMore agricultural products?
questions.a: You can easily apply to become a distributor by filling out the application form on our Distributors page or by directly messaging our sales team on WhatsApp. We welcome partnerships across India.

questions.q: What are the benefits of becoming a GrowMore distributor?
questions.a: GrowMore distributors enjoy industry-leading profit margins, dedicated marketing support, access to a premium range of research-backed agricultural products, and membership in an exclusive network of over 200 successful dealers.

questions.q: In which locations does GrowMore currently have distributors?
questions.a: We have a rapidly expanding network of trusted distributors across India, with major central hubs currently operating in Indore, Sehore, and Ujjain in Madhya Pradesh.
